ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Entire Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MONICA PAOLI's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action With Prejudice.

Defendant Monica Ramona Paoli's motion to dismiss entire action with prejudice is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

The Court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mark Carbone, Esq. appearing for defendant. No appearance by plaintiff. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Dec-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories; Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; To Appear For Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And/Or Their Attorney; Memo Of P &A And Dec In Support
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

Ruling: DEFENDANT MONICA PAOLI Motion To Compel Verified Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories; Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; To Appear For Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And/Or Their Attorney is granted. Plaintiff shall serve discovery responses without objection and appear for deposition within 30 days of the date of order. Sanctions of $90.00 are awarded against plaintiff and shall be paid to defendant's counsel forthwith. Order signed. Moving party shall give written notice of this order. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
